title: Polymarket Bets on Paris Temperature Prompt Investigation After Unusual Spikes
summary_full: The authorities said a Paris airport weather sensor may have been tampered with as large wagers were placed on the betting site.
summary_public: The authorities said a Paris airport weather sensor may have been tampered with as large wagers were placed on the betting site.

FR.label: neutral
FR.evidence: Paris airport weather sensor may have been tampered with
